description: A long-form blog post written by Joe Innes.

main.description: A single blog post authored in Markdown, with embedded ::island directives.

createdAt.description: When the post was first published.

richBody.description: Body of the post as Markdown, including inline ::island directives.

updatedAt.description: When the post was last updated.

excerpt.description: Short summary used in listings and metadata.

pageBg.description: Custom accent/background colour for the post page.

bskyPostUri.description: AT URI of the corresponding Bluesky post, if any.
